title: SCHOOL SUPPLIES - 211info
text: INFORMATIONAL RECORD SCHOOL SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Many schools receive assistance through school supply drives and corporate donations. Assistance may include backpacks, laptops, or Chromebooks for at-home use during the school year, home internet access/ hot spot assistance, and school supplies such as pencils, crayons, and notebooks. Assistance varies by the school district and funding availability and is not guaranteed. Parents or caregivers can contact the child's school or school district to find out if they offer school supplies for students in need. Families experiencing homelessness can also contact the McKinney-Vento homeless liaison at their school. Confidential Address INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call local school office or school district for information. Sometimes getting in touch with the school counselor or social worker directly is the best option. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
